'''Dorum''' was a city on the planet [[Balamak/Legends|Balamak]],<ref name="CE" /> it was the site of the [[Battle of Balamak/Legends|testing]] of an experimental [[CIS Jammer Prototype|communications-jamming system]] developed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="HN" /><ref name="CE" />
